claim_support.reason: Severe issue: Financial Analysis Paragraph 1 and 2 claim 'Year-over-year' growth rates (15.32%, 1.13%, 10.01%), but the cited calculation objects (ff2cdb57, 7dbb3699) explicitly define these as Sequential/Quarter-over-Quarter comparisons (e.g., Q2 vs Q1, Q4 vs Q3). The evidence metadata contradicts the textual claim regarding the nature of the growth metric.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe issue: Growth percentages are mathematically correct for Sequential comparisons but are mislabeled as 'Year-over-Year' in the text (Financial Analysis Para 1 & 2). Additionally, Q4 Revenue growth is reported as 4.8% (Recent Developments Para 1) and 1.13% (Financial Analysis Para 1), creating a material numerical contradiction for the same metric.

citation_precision.reason: Citation IDs correctly map to the provided evidence chunks and calculation objects. The error lies in the interpretation of the data within the text, not in the citation linking mechanism.

temporal_validity.reason: All news sources and financial periods (Q4 2025, FY 2025) are consistent with the report As-of date of 2026-01-20. No post-as-of information is used.

consistency.reason: Severe inconsistency: Q4 Revenue growth is stated as 4.8% in Recent Developments but 1.13% in Financial Analysis. Furthermore, the report inconsistently applies the term 'Year-over-Year' to Sequential calculations in the Financial Analysis section, contradicting standard financial terminology and the evidence metadata.
